/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -w -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libadios2_enet.so.2.11 -o ../../../lib/libadios2_enet.so.2.11.0 CMakeFiles/enet.dir/callbacks.c.o CMakeFiles/enet.dir/compress.c.o CMakeFiles/enet.dir/host.c.o CMakeFiles/enet.dir/list.c.o CMakeFiles/enet.dir/packet.c.o CMakeFiles/enet.dir/peer.c.o CMakeFiles/enet.dir/protocol.c.o CMakeFiles/enet.dir/unix.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,::::::::::::::
